subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Plaza in Minneapolis, 1912-09-19
subcodes.first_line: Notwithstanding this, the Muslims and Christians alike are not satisfied with us. They are engaged in pleasurable diversions and enjoyable pastimes
subcodes.first_line_orig: با وجود این باز نصاری و مسلمین از ما راضی نیستند و حال انکه انها در خانهٴ خود سر گرم راحت و عشرتند
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
